sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_data (event_time TIME, event_id INT);
SELECT event_id, date_part('minute', event_time) AS event_minute, ~('110010'::BITSTRING) AS negated_bitstring FROM time_data WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;

SELECT event_id, date_part('minute', event_time) AS event_minute, (SELECT AVG(date_part('minute', event_time)) FROM time_data WHERE event_id = 1) AS avg_minute FROM time_data GROUP BY event_id HAVING event_minute = (SELECT MAX(date_part('minute', event_time)) FROM time_data);
CREATE TABLE bitwise_data (binary_value BITSTRING, identifier INT);
SELECT identifier, ~binary_value AS negated_value FROM bitwise_data WHERE binary_value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT event_id, date_part('minute', event_time) + (SELECT MAX(COALESCE(~binary_value::INTEGER, 0)) FROM bitwise_data) AS combined_result FROM time_data WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY event_id HAVING combined_result > 0 ORDER BY combined_result DESC;
